reviewer.method: Independent human visual review of every scoped contact sheet at original resolution, with original 2048×2048 assets opened for doubtful or information-dense cells.

applied_total_overrides.rationale: The listing is a 90-count frozen sandwich SKU, but Amazon auto-classified it as PASTRY, whose current unit_count schema rejects Count. A non-mutating GROCERY preview accepted 90 Count and number_of_items=90 with no issues. The ounce fallback is retained only for a failed post-GET product-type or issue verification.

The intended sellable quantity is 24 individual sandwiches. The MasterBundle pack_count=6 and legacy draft_components qty=6 describe stale retail-carton arithmetic and conflict with the selected recipe and live customer-facing unit identity.
This SKU contains 45 individual sandwiches. The legacy title incorrectly treated a 4-count retail carton as the sellable unit and multiplied it by 45, producing a false 180-sandwich unit_count.

scope.marketplace_main_images: Exact immutable files fetched from each scoped listing MAIN URL.

classification_contract.KEEP: No concrete visual defect found against the audited recipe and approved MAIN-image family. KEEP is not cryptographic proof of donor provenance.
classification_contract.REGENERATE: At least one concrete, image-visible defect requires replacement before the listing can be considered conformant.
classification_contract.NEEDS_EVIDENCE: Pixels are insufficient for a defensible keep/regenerate decision. No scoped row remained in this class after original-asset review.

acceptance_criteria: White EPS cooler photographed at a clean three-quarter angle on a pure white background.
Ornate green Salutem emblem plus black SALUTEM SOLUTIONS wordmark/slogan on the cooler.
Blue-header frozen gel packs in the established design; four are preferred, but count variance alone is not a rejection.
Every ledger recipe component is visibly represented by genuine, exact Smucker's Uncrustables product identity.
No invented/lookalike product, wrong variant, missing component, extra flavor, or unsupported package configuration.
No retailer-exclusive badge or retailer mark in the reusable Amazon MAIN scene.
Products and gel packs appear physically seated/packed, without implausible floating geometry.
interpretation_notes: Current “Reduced Sugar ... on Wheat” packaging is treated as the genuine current identity for ledger donors named “Whole Wheat”; that wording change alone is not a defect.
Red, White & Berry, Bright-Eyed Berry, Up & Apple, Burstin' Blueberry, and Beamin' Berry Blend are genuine named products when their manufacturer identity and exact flavor match.
Generic wrapper/carton backs without readable genuine Smucker's/Uncrustables and exact flavor identity are rejected when they cannot prove the specified recipe component.
Exactly four gel packs remains the preferred regeneration target; otherwise-conforming legacy images were not rejected solely for a different visible gel-pack count.
Textual quantity is checked against effective_total_units and visible package arithmetic where legible; product-specific package formats must themselves be genuine.

manufacturer_references.purpose: Whole Wheat strawberry/current Reduced Sugar on Wheat identity
Whole Wheat grape/current Reduced Sugar on Wheat identity
Red, White & Berry genuine mixed-berry identity
Beamin' Berry Blend genuine product and 8-count package evidence
Raspberry genuine product and current package sizes
Peanut butter & chocolate genuine retailer-exclusive product identity
